trending_videos.title: Colorado Avalanche at Minnesota Wild
trending_videos.description: The Avalanche face the Wild in Game 3 of the West second round at Grand Casino Arena in St. Paul. Colorado has won two straight. Martin Necas scored in Game 2, but Kirill Kaprizov tied it six seconds later for the fifth-fastest response in history.

trending_videos.title: Subnautica 2 Early Access Gameplay Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Subnautica 2 is an underwater survival adventure game set on an all-new alien world. It is the next chapter in the Subnautica universe, developed by Unknown Worlds.

Driven from your home by ongoing conflict, Alterra offers you the chance at a new life. But as the colony ship CICADA shepherds you and your fellow Pioneers to your new home, something goes awry. The ship’s AI insists that your mission should continue. Stranded and faced with near-insurmountable odds, you must do everything in your power to survive. The future of humanity on this world is in your hands.

Subnautica 2 enters Early Access on May 14th, 2026, at 08:00 PDT / 15:00 UTC. 

✨ Wishlist Subnautica 2 Now ✨

Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1962700/Subnautica_2/
Epic: https://store.epicgames.com/p/subnautica-2-d27f94
Xbox: https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/subnautica-2/9PJPCB188SVG

Play Day One on Xbox Game Pass!

🐟 Join the Community 🐟

Discord: https://discord.gg/subnautica
X: https://twitter.com/Subn

trending_videos.title: Truist Championship, Third Round
trending_videos.description: The third round and Moving Day of this Signature Event on the PGA TOUR takes place at Quail Hollow Club in Charlotte, North Carolina. The players are competing for the $20 million purse. The 2025 champion, Sepp Straka, returns to maintain his title.

trending_videos.title: BFDIA 25 TRAILER — TICKETS AVAILABLE NOW!
trending_videos.description:
Tickets are available until May 14 at 11:55pm local: https://shop.jacknjellify.com/

On May 17, the winner of BFDIA will be revealed... IN THEATERS! Will Needle or Book pull out the victory? Join us and root for your favorite finalist in the last ever BFDIA episode!
Have questions? Email us at support@screeny.com

@FusionAnimations

content_trends.diversified_content: The trending videos cover a wide range of topics including sports, music, gaming, trailers, and news. This diversity indicates a broad audience interest across various genres.
content_trends.gaming_and_entertainment: Gaming and entertainment content, such as 'Subnautica 2 Early Access Gameplay Trailer' and 'Mom Movie Trailer - SNL', suggests a steady demand for gaming-related content and comedic entertainment.
content_trends.sports_coverage: Multiple sports events, like 'Colorado Avalanche at Minnesota Wild' and 'SEC Tournament: Texas vs. Alabama', highlight a strong audience interest in live sports and related content.

creator_patterns.single_video_per_channel: Each top channel, such as 'Tasik Yard' and 'Saturday Night Live', contributes one video to the trending list. This pattern suggests a focus on quality or specialized content that resonates with their audience.
creator_patterns.established_channels: Channels like 'Saturday Night Live' are known for consistent content output that often trends, indicating strong brand presence and loyal follower base.

market_opportunities.cross-category content: With a mix of music, sports, and gaming, exploring cross-category content could engage multiple audience segments. For instance, creating a music video themed around popular sports or games.
market_opportunities.emerging trends in gaming: The interest in 'Subnautica 2' suggests a growing trend in gaming content, particularly early access or gameplay trailers. Investing in similar content could capture the gaming audience's attention.
market_opportunities.live event coverage: The appeal of live sports events indicates an opportunity to enhance live coverage or create supplementary content, such as behind-the-scenes footage or expert analyses, to capitalize on this interest.

data_analysis.view_distribution: Given the total views and number of videos, the viewership is relatively evenly distributed, suggesting that each topic has a significant and engaged audience.

actionable_insights.content_diversification: Creators should consider diversifying their content to include trending topics such as gaming and live sports, which consistently draw high engagement.
actionable_insights.engagement_maximization: Focus on creating high-quality, engaging trailers or teasers for upcoming events or releases to maximize viewer interest and retention.
actionable_insights.brand collaborations: Channels could explore collaborations with established brands across different content categories to expand their reach and tap into diverse audience bases.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
